title: Green Thumb Industries Reports First Quarter 2025 Results
text: Green Thumb Industries reported Q1 2025 results with revenues of $280 million. The company opened RISE Whitehall, which serves the greater Columbus, Ohio area. As of Q1 2025, Green Thumb has 20 manufacturing facilities and 104 open retail locations and operations across 14 U.S. markets. In these three states specifically, retail revenue decreased in Q1 2025 primarily due to price compression in existing markets including Pennsylvania and New Jersey, though this was partially offset by continued growth in Ohio. Green Thumb owns state-licensed medical and/or adult-use cannabis businesses in New Jersey, Ohio, and Pennsylvania, along with other states. The company operates 3 retail locations in New Jersey, 5 in Ohio, and 18 in Pennsylvania. The company manufactures branded cannabis products that it distributes to both its own retail stores and third-party retailers, diversifying its revenue streams beyond direct retail sales.
